source_jobs.title: Staff Writer and Editorial Lead
source_jobs.description:
ScaleMath is hiring a Staff Writer and Editorial Lead to work directly with the founder and help drive high-leverage initiatives across the business.

This is not a traditional "writing-only" role. You’ll be involved in content and editorial work, but you’ll also jump into partnerships, sales support, client calls, messaging, positioning, internal projects, and whatever else the business needs. The common thread is: you’re a high-judgment operator who can own work end-to-end and ship high-quality outcomes.

This role exists because our current internal “right hand” is becoming a bottleneck. We need someone with the same level of written English ability and attention to detail to share the load and help ScaleMath move faster without lowering standards.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We’re looking for someone who fits the following criteria:

 - Strategic + hands-on – able to set direction and execute, owning initiatives end-to-end with real accountability

 - Exceptional attention to detail – holds a high precision bar and catches issues others miss

 - Elite written communicator – writes clearly, confidently, and with strong structure and flow

 - High-level copywriter / “sentence designer” – strong at line-level writing: clarity, rhythm, persuasion, and restraint

 - Quality bar setter – elevates the standard for what “good” looks like across content and messaging

 - Strong editorial judgment – knows what to cut, what to keep, what to emphasize, and what will confuse the reader

 - Execution-first mindset – reliably ships finished work, not just drafts, outlines, or ideas

 - Brand voice steward – maintains consistency of tone, positioning, and messaging across channels

 - Trusted internal reviewer – improves others’ work through thoughtful critique, rewrites, and refinement


WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role will evolve over time, but you can expect to work across areas like:

 - Writing and editing high-quality content (including founder-led content)

 - Improving messaging, positioning, and narrative clarity across the business

 - Reviewing and polishing important documents, emails, and customer-facing assets

 - Supporting partnerships: outreach, coordination, follow-ups, and deal flow

 - Joining client and partner calls where strong communication matters

 - Supporting sales efforts with copy, decks, follow-ups, and materials

 - Owning internal initiatives end-to-end (research, execution, and delivery)

 - Acting as a force multiplier for the founder and the team


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 - Work that used to bottleneck now ships consistently, without quality dropping

 - Our content, messaging, and outbound feels sharper, clearer, and more “ScaleMath”

 - Initiatives move forward because you proactively push them forward

 - The founder’s time is protected and the business moves faster


WHO THIS IS PERFECT FOR

This role is ideal if you’re someone who:

 - Loves writing, editing, and high-quality communication

 - Also enjoys business problem-solving and cross-functional execution

 - Wants real ownership, not narrow job lanes

 - Can switch between “craft” work and “operator” work without losing quality


LOCATION

UK is preferred, but we’re open to hiring globally for the right person.




HOW TO APPLY

Send us:

 - A short note on why this role fits you

 - 2–3 examples of your best writing (published or private is fine)

 - Anything that shows how you operate (projects, initiatives you owned, etc.)

source_jobs.title: Future Opportunities: Content Specialist
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a talented, driven, and enthusiastic Technical Content Specialist to join our growing remote team to produce content for us, and the industry-leading organizations we partner with. You'll form a core part of the work we do at ScaleMath, working closely with our Operations Team and Head of Content.

Note: We operate a rolling application process. We are not always hiring or looking to fill positions ASAP, so if you apply now, your application will be reviewed but may not be considered and invited for an interview immediately. 


ABOUT SCALEMATH

About ScaleMathScaleMath is a bootstrapped, profitable, 100% distributed team of creative marketers, makers, and operators backing the world's leading companies on customer acquisition & experience.
We pride ourselves on being the very best at what we do and deliver experiences customers fall in love with over and over again. Since 2017, we've been in the business of software – creating category-leading companies on our advisory and services side. Working at ScaleMath is for you if you want to be a part of a driven team that's motivated and fulfilled by doing exceptional work for incredible companies every single day.


WE'D LIKE TO HEAR FROM YOU IF:

 - You want to pursue content planning and development as a long-term career.

 - You have experience writing long-form content such as blog posts, guides, eBooks, etc.

 - You’re comfortable as a manager of one.

 - You’re a stickler for style, grammar, punctuation, and finding the words and phrases that best capture an idea or feeling.

 - You are incredibly well-organized and motivated.

 - You want to join a fast-growing organization to work as part of a team that works with industry-leading companies.

 - You understand and have experience with on-page SEO.

 - You understand distribution channels for content, including search engines, social media, and email.

 - You're able to describe or create a content strategy for a given audience.

 - You have a reliable internet connection/access.

 - Know how to construct a narrative that connects the reader’s needs to the proposed solution (the client's product/service) and compels them to take action.

 - Are comfortable with writing about technical topics in detail, including but not limited to Docker, Laravel, PHP, WordPress.

 - You are comfortable receiving constructive criticism and advice aimed at helping you to grow and develop your content writing skills even further.

You approach everything you do with a spirit of partnership and collaboration, not exclusion or rigidness. You're resourceful and a true problem solver, able to feel gaps in what you're working on, pitch solutions, and implement them.

At ScaleMath, we do so much more than just create great content. We drive growth. This is a job where you can do the best work of your career. ScaleMath is committed to remaining a calm company where we don't regularly work longer than 40 hours per week, and take proper vacations.


IN YOUR ROLE, YOU'LL NEED TO:

 - Create, edit, and manage content for a variety of mediums that could include: email, newsletters, blogs, white papers/guides, thought leadership articles, customer case studies, website pages, webinar slide decks, sales collateral, event collateral, and video scripts.

 - Maintain the master content calendar that schedules all aspects of the creation and delivery of content throughout the year.

 - Understand and apply SEO best practices, including formatting (H1 tags, etc.).

 - Provide meta descriptions with each article draft.

 - Create content tailored to a specific promotion or business goals.

 - Provide feedback, suggestions, and strategy for improving client outcomes.

 - Be a kick-ass teammate, communicator, and collaborator.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Must be very fluent in written English.

 - Problem-solving aptitude.

 - Analytical mind with business acumen.

 - Excellent communication skills.

 - BSc in Design, Computer Science, Engineering, or a rel

source_jobs.title: Video Editor & Motion Designer
source_jobs.description:
We’re hiring a Video Editor & Motion Designer to join our team and turn recorded footage (tutorials, case studies, webinars, and talking-head content) into clean, engaging, publish-ready videos. You’ll work across two types of projects:



#1 – ScaleMath Studios
Our in-house video content and YouTube channel. This includes our podcast https://scalemath.com/podcast/.



#2 – Advisory & Services
Video and content assets we produce for companies we work with.



Here are examples of our current styles: https://scalemath.com/video-examples



While we will welcome improvements to this style over time, please do not apply if you are not comfortable producing videos in the same style as any of the 7 videos on this page.



This role is for someone who cares deeply, to the point of obsession, about:

 - Attention to detail

 - Pacing

 - Clarity

 - Polish

 - Viewer comprehension

 - Using motion graphics to support the story/message (not distract from it)


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Edit long-form recorded footage into tight, high-retention videos

 - Improve pacing, structure, and clarity while preserving the speaker’s natural delivery

 - Create and integrate motion graphics (lower thirds, callouts, simple explainer sequences, UI highlights, transitions)

 - Add B-roll, overlays, and on-screen text where it improves understanding

 - Handle audio cleanup, leveling, and general sound polish

 - Produce rough cuts and iterate quickly based on feedback

 - Deliver final exports optimized for YouTube and other channels

 - Maintain a consistent style and quality bar across multiple brands and projects

 - Improve our workflow over time (templates, presets, reusable motion systems)


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Proven experience editing YouTube videos or long-form educational content

 - Strong editorial judgment: pacing, structure, clarity, and storytelling

 - Motion design ability (After Effects or equivalent) for clean, modern, functional animation

 - High attention to detail across cuts, timing, audio, and on-screen text

 - Strong taste: you know what looks modern vs outdated

 - Comfortable taking feedback and iterating quickly

 - Reliable, self-directed, and able to deliver consistently


TOOLS

You can use your preferred tools, but most of our workflow is compatible with:

 - Descript

 - Premiere Pro

 - After Effects

 - Frame.io http://Frame.io


BONUS POINTS (NOT REQUIRED)

 - Experience editing SaaS, B2B, or product-led content

 - Ability to create a reusable motion system for a channel (titles, lower thirds, callouts, transitions)

 - Thumbnail design experience

 - Familiarity with retention editing principles for YouTube

 - Experience working with founders and subject matter experts


HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

 - 2–4 examples you’re proud of (YouTube links preferred). We are looking for ones that match (or are similar to) the styles of the 7 examples provided here https://scalemath.com/video-examples.

 - A short note about your role in each project (editing only vs editing + motion)

 - Your typical turnaround time for a 10–20 minute video

REQUIREMENTS

 - Must be very fluent in written English.

 - Problem-solving aptitude.

 - Analytical mind with business acumen.

 - Excellent communication skills.

 - BSc in Design, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field is a plus.

 - Experience working as a part of a remote team where you weren't micro-managed.

 - Ability to solve problems creatively and effectively.


BENEFITS

 - Flexible working hours (ideally 5-6 hours overlap with UK Time zone).

 - 20 days paid holiday per year


HOW TO APPLY

Please send an application tailored to this position that speaks to us. Introduce yourself to us as a colleague. Within your cover letter, give u

notes: ScaleMath appears to be a content-focused organization with a small team and a rolling application process.
